api_key.description: Invoiced API key. Sent as the HTTP Basic username with a blank password; never logged.

base_url.description: Invoiced API base URL. Use https://api.sandbox.invoiced.com for sandbox accounts or an override for tests/proxies.

max_pages.description: Maximum pages; use 0, all, or unlimited to exhaust the stream.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.

contact_id.description: Invoiced contact id used for detail or nested read streams.

coupon_id.description: Invoiced coupon id used for detail or nested read streams.

credit_balance_adjustment_id.description: Invoiced credit balance adjustment id used for detail or nested read streams.

credit_note_id.description: Invoiced credit note id used for detail or nested read streams.

customer_id.description: Invoiced customer id used for detail or nested read streams.

estimate_id.description: Invoiced estimate id used for detail or nested read streams.

event_id.description: Invoiced event id used for detail or nested read streams.

file_id.description: Invoiced file id used for detail or nested read streams.

invoice_id.description: Invoiced invoice id used for detail or nested read streams.

item_id.description: Invoiced item id used for detail or nested read streams.

line_item_id.description: Invoiced line item id used for detail or nested read streams.

payment_id.description: Invoiced payment id used for detail or nested read streams.

plan_id.description: Invoiced plan id used for detail or nested read streams.

subscription_id.description: Invoiced subscription id used for detail or nested read streams.

task_id.description: Invoiced task id used for detail or nested read streams.

tax_rate_id.description: Invoiced tax rate id used for detail or nested read streams.
